allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) schemas = data.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\) for name in ['sip2_account', 'sip2_institution', 'SIP2Account', 'SIP2Institution']: if name in schemas: print\(f'=== {name} ==='\) print\(json.dumps\(schemas[name], indent=2\)\) ")
